subject: A humanoid figure runs at speed through a dark urban environment, surrounded by streaks of red energy, with a large armored leg looming in the foreground
description: A humanoid figure sprints across a dark rooftop or street-level urban surface, arms pumping, with bright red magical streaks or sparks erupting around their body — suggesting either a pursuit or a desperate escape. The figure faces the viewer at a slight angle, expression focused and intense. In the lower-right foreground, a massive armored leg and boot occupy the frame, belonging to an unseen giant or construct looming over the scene. Blue-white lightning crackles in the sky behind the runner. Dark spires and industrial silhouettes fill the background. The palette is primarily dark grays and blacks with red accent streaks and cool blue-white sky illumination.
foreground: sprinting humanoid figure with red energy streaks; giant armored leg in extreme foreground
background: dark urban rooftops, lightning-charged sky, gothic spires
emotion: desperate focus — running hard, jaw set
